/usr/bin/c++  -O3 -std=c++11 -Wall -Doff64_t=_off64_t -O3 -DNDEBUG -rdynamic -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/map_generation.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/objects.dir/src/argtable3/argtable3.c.o CMakeFiles/objects.dir/src/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/objects.dir/src/dcel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/objects.dir/src/delaunay.cpp.o CMakeFiles/objects.dir/src/fontface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/objects.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/objects.dir/src/mapgenerator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/objects.dir/src/poissondiscsampler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/objects.dir/src/render.cpp.o CMakeFiles/objects.dir/src/resources.cpp.o CMakeFiles/objects.dir/src/spatialpointgrid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/objects.dir/src/stopwatch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/objects.dir/src/vertexmap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/objects.dir/src/voronoi.cpp.o -o map_generation  -lpython3.12
